home.name: Muhammad Osama Fawad
home.tagline: I build at the intersection of
home.description: Computer Vision and AI Engineer with **5+ years of industrial R&D experience** — from shipping ML models to **300K+ fleet customers** at **Motive** (Forbes Cloud 100, VTTI-ranked #1 AI dashcam) to prototyping AR surgical guidance at **Cochlear** (one of the biggest medical tech companies). MSc in Computer Vision & Robotics (UBE / UdG, Erasmus Scholar). Specialized in **Deep Learning**, **3D Computer Vision**, **SLAM**, **ROS**, **LLMs** and **Agentic AI** — from model development to production deployment on cloud and edge.
home.openTo: Open to: AI/ML, Computer Vision, Robotics, and AI Software Engineering roles

timeline.degree: Erasmus+ Exchange — M.Sc. Intelligent Robotics Systems
timeline.description: Erasmus+ semester exchange as the 3rd semester of the joint European Master's programme in Computer Vision & Robotics.
highlights: **Erasmus+ Exchange**, co-funded by the **European Union** 🇪🇺
3rd Semester (2nd year) of the joint European Masters in Computer Vision & Robotics

timeline.description: Joint European Master's programme in Computer Vision, Robotics and Intelligent Systems across multiple European universities.
highlights: **Erasmus Scholar** — Erasmus+ funded semester exchange at University of Girona, Spain
Thesis: **Augmented Reality (AR) Assistive Surgery** for Cochlear Implants at [Cochlear Ltd](https://www.cochlear.com/au/en/home)

timeline.degree: B.Sc. Engineering Sciences — Photonics and Optical Engineering
timeline.description: Accredited engineering programme in Photonics and Optical Engineering with specialisation in AI, robotics and embedded systems.
highlights: Accreditation: [Washington Accord](https://www.internationalengineeringalliance.org/accords/washington-accord) & Pakistan Engineering Council (PEC)
**President** at [SPIE](https://spie.org/) GIKI Student Chapter & **Team Captain**, GIKI Robotics Team (Technobolt)
Final Year Project: **Bio-Inspired Underwater Robot** with Undulating Fin Based Locomotion — **1st Position in University**
Won **IGNITE Grant** (National ICT Funds by Government of Pakistan) for Final Year Project

jobs.description: Developing a first-of-its-kind AR surgical guidance system at one of the world's biggest medical tech companies — CI surgery, dubbed the **'blind surgery'**, is performed by very few specialists, and with **3× more procedures needed than surgeons available by 2030**, this system enables non-specialists to operate, directly addressing the global CI surgeon shortage.
highlights: Built **Visual-Inertial SLAM** (deep learning + geometric approaches, RGB-D + IMU) for real-time dense **3D Reconstruction**; automatic **3D CT-to-scene registration**; neural segmentation for live **AR overlay** of anatomical structures
Evaluated **ORB-SLAM3 + TSDF Fusion** and **MASt3R-SLAM** with loop closure for surgical-precision-grade drift correction
Replaced all prior infeasible prototypes — **20× cost reduction** through algorithm-first design

jobs.description: Led end-to-end AI delivery for **10+ enterprise clients** as solutions architect and team lead — from system design and client scoping to **cloud deployment**, achieving **200% increase in deal closing**.
highlights: Built production **RAG pipelines** (LangChain, LlamaIndex, Ollama) with **citation-accurate retrieval** for enterprise customer support
Developed **Agentic AI** and workflow automation systems using **LangGraph**, MCP, and n8n
Defined technical architecture, scope, and **cloud deployment strategy** across diverse enterprise AI use cases

jobs.description: **3+ years** building production AI dashcam for driver safety — at a **Forbes Cloud 100** company, **VTTI-ranked #1 AI Dashcam**, deployed to **300K+ commercial fleets** across North America.
highlights: **Computer Vision Models**: Trained and deployed **EfficientDet & YoloX** with **Knowledge Distillation**; implemented Stateless **LSTM/ConvLSTM** on frame-level detector embeddings for real-time **Activity Recognition**
Developed heuristics-based post-processing filters — **10% increase in feature precision**; FFT on telematics data for drowsiness detection

**Data Engineering & MLOps**: Automated AWS pipelines (EC2, S3, Lambda) for large-scale extraction; SQL queries and dashboards — drove **35% cumulative accuracy gain** and **22% reduction in client accident rates**

jobs.company: Facility of Advanced Robotics and Intelligent Systems (109-PAF)
highlights: Researched, prototyped and deployed **4+ robotics & perception systems** including autonomous ground vehicles, aerial drones, and training simulators
Implemented **Extended Kalman Filter** sensor fusion across IMU, camera, and ranging sensors for robust localisation
Deployed deep learning inference on **Nvidia Jetson TX2** for real-time embedded perception pipelines
Full hardware integration via I2C, SPI, UART, RS232 communication protocols

items.title: 3D Reconstruction via Incremental SfM
items.description: Built a full Structure-from-Motion pipeline from scratch — feature extraction, matching, RANSAC-based outlier rejection, incremental bundle adjustment — to recover dense 3D point clouds from unordered image sets.

items.title: Visual-Inertial SLAM + Dense 3D Reconstruction
items.description: Developed visual-inertial SLAM and dense reconstruction pipelines with ORB-SLAM3 + TSDF fusion and MASt3R-SLAM for precision-grade 3D mapping.

items.title: RAG-based Self-hosted LLM for Enterprise Support
items.description: Developed production RAG systems for enterprise support with citation-aware retrieval and locally hosted LLM stacks.

items.title: Multi-App ETL Autonomous AI Workspace (n8n)
items.description: Built an autonomous multi-app ETL workflow orchestration system in n8n — integrating REST APIs, LLMs, and AI agents for enterprise operations and AI-assisted reporting pipelines.

items.title: Bio-Inspired Underwater Robot
items.description: Designed an underwater robot with undulating-fin locomotion and embedded sensing/control for bio-inspired robotic propulsion.

items.title: BigGAN-lite for Synthetic Face Generation
items.description: Created a lightweight BigGAN variant for multi-attribute synthetic face generation on CelebA while reducing model complexity.

items.title: Satellite Imagery Analysis Pipeline
items.description: End-to-end analysis of Sentinel-2 satellite imagery — NDVI/NDWI vegetation and water detection, YOLOv8 building detection with grid-based tile splitting, and interactive Leaflet.js map with a FastAPI backend.

items.title: Multilingual Video Dubbing + GAN Lip-Sync
items.description: End-to-end AI dubbing pipeline: Faster Whisper ASR → NLLB-200 translation (200+ languages) → Edge TTS with elastic timeline alignment → Wav2Lip GAN lip-sync. Supports YouTube and local video sources.

items.title: TurtleBot LiDAR Obstacle Avoidance with RL
items.description: Trained a TurtleBot using reinforcement learning for LiDAR-based obstacle avoidance and autonomous path planning.

items.title: Activity Recognition with YOLO Embeddings + LSTM
items.description: Built activity recognition using YOLO embeddings fed into LSTM sequence models for dynamic spatio-temporal behavior understanding.

items.title: Job Application Agent
items.description: Developed an agent that searches relevant roles, tailors CV content, and automates parts of job applications across platforms.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Technical stack across ML, Computer Vision, Robotics & AI

items.description: Awarded the Erasmus+ scholarship by the European Union for a semester exchange at the University of Girona, Spain, studying M.Sc. Intelligent Robotics Systems — as part of the joint European Master's programme in Computer Vision & Robotics.

items.title: Best Final Year Project Award

items.description: Institute-wide Best FYP Award for the Bio-Inspired Underwater Robot with undulating-fin based locomotion.

items.title: IGNITE Grant
items.org: National ICT R&D Fund by Government of Pakistan
items.description: Won the maximum attainable IGNITE grant for the Bio-Inspired Underwater Robot Final Year Project at GIKI.

items.title: 1st Place — RoboMaze Module
items.description: Won first place in the Maze Solving Robot challenge at NEO'18, implementing a custom A* pathfinding algorithm on an autonomous robot under real-time constraints.

items.title: Runner-up — AI Module
items.description: Runner-up in the AI challenge with a Miniature Self-Driving Car project at NEO'20.
